description: A skill effect that temporarily disables a randomly selected weapon item on the target actor. When applied, it selects a matching weapon from the actor's inventory and sets all skills on that weapon to disabled state.

functions_analyzed.name: DisableItem.Create
functions_analyzed.purpose: Factory method that creates a DisableItemHandler instance and links it to the effect

functions_analyzed.name: DisableItem.ctor
functions_analyzed.purpose: Constructor that initializes the includeTags and excludeTags lists

functions_analyzed.name: DisableItemHandler.OnAdded
functions_analyzed.purpose: Called when effect is applied. Finds matching items, selects one randomly, and disables its skills

functions_analyzed.name: DisableItemHandler.OnRemoved
functions_analyzed.purpose: Called when effect is removed. Re-enables the previously disabled item's skills

functions_analyzed.name: DisableItemHandler.Apply
functions_analyzed.purpose: Core logic that iterates through item skills and sets their Disabled flag

functions_analyzed.name: DisableItemHandler.<>c__DisplayClass3_0.<OnAdded>b__0
functions_analyzed.purpose: Lambda/closure that filters items based on slot type and tag criteria

fields.name: includeTags
fields.description: List of tags that an item MUST have to be considered for disabling. When includeTagFilterMode is 0 (Any), item needs at least one matching tag. When mode is 1 (All), item needs all tags.
fields.evidence: Constructor initializes List<TagTemplate> at offset 0x58, lambda iterates this list and calls HasTag on item templates

fields.name: includeTagFilterMode
fields.description: Controls how includeTags are matched. 0=Any (item needs at least one tag), 1=All (item needs all tags to match)
fields.evidence: Lambda checks this value with 'CMP dword ptr [RCX + 0x60], 0x0' and 'CMP dword ptr [RCX + 0x60], 0x1' to branch logic

fields.name: excludeTags
fields.description: List of tags that an item must NOT have. When excludeTagFilterMode is 0 (Any), item is excluded if it has any of these tags. When mode is 1 (All), item is excluded only if it has all these tags.
fields.evidence: Constructor initializes List<TagTemplate> at offset 0x68, lambda iterates this list after processing includeTags

fields.name: excludeTagFilterMode
fields.description: Controls how excludeTags are matched. 0=Any (exclude if item has any tag), 1=All (exclude only if item has all tags)
fields.evidence: Lambda checks this value with 'CMP dword ptr [RCX + 0x70], 0x1' and 'CMP dword ptr [RCX + 0x70], 0x0' for exclusion logic

fields.name: selectedItem (handler field)
fields.description: The DisableItemHandler stores a reference to the randomly selected disabled item at handler+0x20. This is used by OnRemoved to re-enable the item.
fields.evidence: OnAdded stores selected item at param_1+0x20, OnRemoved checks and clears this field, Apply uses item's skills list at item+0x30

key_discoveries.finding: Only weapon slot items are targeted
key_discoveries.detail: The lambda checks ItemTemplate+0xEC == 3, which corresponds to the Weapon slot type. Other item types (armor, accessories, etc.) are ignored.
When multiple items match the criteria, one is selected randomly using PseudoRandom.Range(0, matchingItems.Count-1). This means the same effect can disable different weapons on repeated applications.

key_discoveries.finding: Skills are disabled via a Disabled flag
key_discoveries.detail: The Apply function iterates through item.Skills (at item+0x30) and sets skill.Disabled (at skill+0x38) to 0 (disabled) or 1 (enabled).
Items are filtered using a two-phase tag check: first includeTags (item must match), then excludeTags (item must not match). Each phase supports Any or All matching modes.
The handler has access to GetActor(), GetEntity(), GetOwner() methods via the base class. The owning skill is stored at handler+0x10.

fields.name: skill
fields.note: Reference to owning skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

fields.name: effect
fields.note: Reference to the DisableItem effect definition

ItemSlot_enum_values.note: ItemTemplate+0xEC holds slot type, value 3 = Weapon
ItemSlot_enum_values.evidence: Lambda at 0x18070b3f3 checks CMP dword ptr [RAX + 0xEC], 0x3

TagTemplate.note: Tag ID is stored at TagTemplate+0x78, used for HasTag checks

Item.note: Item.Skills list at item+0x30, used by Apply to iterate skills

BaseSkill.note: Skill.Disabled flag at skill+0x38, set to 0/1 by Apply
